title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
snippet: A girl is among at least eight killed in Ukraine's capital in massive Russian drone and missile attacks, officials say.

title: 'We're right on track,' says Streeting as key target for hospital waiting times hit
snippet: Government his its interim target of 65% of patients in England being treated within 18 weeks.

title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
snippet: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

title: Posh sandwich has more salt than nearly five cheeseburgers
snippet: Action on Salt & Sugar said people should not be exposed to a "hidden health risk every time they buy lunch".

title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

title: Canvas hack: Company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
snippet: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.

title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
snippet: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
snippet: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

title: Woman in bank row over depositing £900 HMRC cheque
snippet: Annabel Yates says she faces a 94 mile round trip to bank a cheque because of changes at Lloyds.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
snippet: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.

title: Big tech bets on new mascots in bid to seem more cuddly
snippet: The likes of Apple, Microsoft and Google are all putting cartoon characters centre stage.

title: Latvian PM resigns after row over stray Ukrainian drones
snippet: Drones bound for Russia crashed down in Latvia last week, prompting a political fallout.

title: Woman guilty of killing ex-husband in acid attack
snippet: Danny Cahalane suffered catastrophic injuries when he was attacked at his home in Plymouth.
